creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This hidden hot pot restaurant in London is right in the middle of Leicester Square and it’s open until 3am! Pick your broth (double or triple!), check out their insane dipping sauce station, get your toppings and tuck in. The flavours are so good 🔥 And don’t skip their viral shaved ice desserts and 1L drinks, they are so creative and perfect to end your meal!

📍 @nanhotpot_london, 1 Leicester Pl, London WC2H 7BP

transcription.text: If you're in the middle of busy Leicester Square you might completely miss this beautiful building and what's so cool is what's hidden inside because as you head inside you'll be transported to 1990s China. It literally feels like you're on a retro night out and is open until 3am and it's also one of the best places for hot pot in the whole of London. They've got an option for double broth or triple broth and the depth of flavour in these is unreal and they have an extensive menu of toppings. Pop everything in sit back and enjoy as everything cooks and don't forget their entire dipping sauce station so you can really customise the exact sauce you want and so many people don't know that this is the place for the viral shaved ice desserts which are absolutely delicious and a must as well as the incredible one litre drinks. This is Nan Hot Pot in Leicester Square definitely check it out.
